welcome: 👋 Hello, {name}! This is a VLESS-based VPN service. Choose a plan and get your subscription link — all servers will be added automatically.
plan_info: 📦 {name} 💰 Price: {price}₽ ⏳ Duration: {days} days 📊 Traffic: {traffic} 📱 Devices: {devices} Choose payment method:
promo_invalid: ❌ Promo code is invalid — please try again or press Back.
promo_applied: ✅ Promo code applied! Discount: {discount} New price: {price}₽
sub_active: 📱 Your Subscription 📦 Plan: {plan} ⏳ Left: {days} days 📊 Traffic: {used} / {limit} 📱 Devices: {devices} {sub_text}
sub_issued: ✅ Subscription is active! Your servers are ready. Tap the button below to add them to your client automatically.
referral_text: 👥 Referral Program Earn 10% of every purchase made by users you invite. 💰 Partner balance: {partner_balance}₽ 👥 Invited: {count} people 💸 Total earned: {total_earned}₽ Your link: {link} To withdraw, tap the button below and enter your payment details.
withdraw_prompt: 💸 Withdrawal Request Available: {balance}₽ Enter your payment details (card number, wallet, etc.):
withdraw_sent: ✅ Withdrawal request for {balance}₽ submitted! An admin will process it within 24 hours.
renewal_offer: ⏰ Your subscription expires in {days} days. Renew now with {discount}% discount! Regular price: {old_price}₽ Discounted price: {new_price}₽

not_subscribed: ❌ You haven't subscribed to the channel yet
